data.body:
## Context
The DSO test gate (record-test-status.sh) determines which tests to run for staged files using filename fuzzy matching and .test-index entries. This catches direct regressions but misses cross-cutting bugs where a change to a central file (one imported/sourced by many others) breaks dependent scripts. In the last month, 17 fix commits were for cross-cutting interaction bugs where the changed file's tests passed but dependent files' tests would have caught the break. The test gate needs awareness of how central a changed file is to expand test coverage proportionally.

## Success Criteria
- record-test-status.sh computes a centrality score for each staged source file: the count of other project files that directly reference it (imports, source commands). Transitive dependencies are not counted — only direct references.
- Centrality is computed via sg --pattern '<import-pattern>' --lang <lang> --json for each staged file, searching project source files. Results are cached per-file per diff hash to avoid redundant computation.
- When sg is not installed (command -v sg returns non-zero), centrality defaults to 0 with a one-line stderr warning. All existing test gate behavior is unchanged.
- When any staged file's centrality score exceeds test_gate.centrality_threshold (default: 8), record-test-status.sh runs the full test suite (commands.test) instead of only directly-associated tests.
- When staged file count exceeds test_gate.file_count_threshold (default: 50), centrality computation is skipped entirely and the full suite runs.
- Import patterns defined in .claude/dso-config.conf under test_gate.import_pattern.<lang> keys using ast-grep pattern syntax. Example patterns ship for: Python, Flask, Ruby, Next.js/TypeScript, Java, Bash.
- record-test-status.sh logs centrality decisions to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-log.jsonl: one JSON line per staged file with {file, centrality_score, threshold, decision: "associated_only"|"full_suite"|"skipped_no_sg"}.
- The pre-commit test gate hook is unchanged — it reads the status file as before.

## Dependencies
- dafa-b1fe (ast-grep integration) — ast-grep must be available for centrality computation; without it, the feature gracefully degrades to current behavior.

## Approach
Enhance record-test-status.sh to compute per-file centrality scores using ast-grep structural pattern matching. When a changed file is highly central (many dependents), run the full test suite instead of just associated tests. Configurable thresholds and per-language import patterns make this portable across tech stacks.
